title: crataegus monogyna f. hirsuta
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. hirsuta, also known as hirsute hawthorn, is a subspecies of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus monogyna), a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve heart health, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna f. hirsuta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular function, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote heart health and overall well-being.
